data.description: 46% of the world's super rich are considering moving to Europe and investing in wine and oil, as per Knight Frank
Labour fears of voter backlash grow as Reeves looks at income tax options

data.title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding completes 2nd sea trials for DDG 128, tested main propulsion & combat systems in Gulf of America.
data.description: In PASCAGOULA, Mississippi, on October 24, 2025, HII’s (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division accomplished the second builder’s sea trials for the guided missile destroyer Ted Stevens (DDG 128). This follows the positive outcome of the first trials held in late September. The destroyer, part of the Arleigh Burke-class (DDG 51), underwent testing for several days in the Gulf of America to evaluate its main propulsion, combat systems, and other essential systems in readiness for upcoming acceptance trials.

data.title: Huntington Bank appoints Joe Nimmons to lead community lending group; Brian Kelso as Regional President for Colorado.
data.description: In Denver on October 24, 2025, The Huntington National Bank (Huntington) appointed Joe Nimmons as the director of community lending. This move is aimed at enhancing community involvement and non-tax credit lending initiatives. This new group will play a crucial role in supporting Huntington's efforts to expand community engagement and lending programs.

data.title: CARBIOS shares report for first half of 2025. Aims to revolutionize plastic and textile life cycles. (Total words: 19)
data.description: On October 24, 2025, at 8:00 pm CEST in Clermont-Ferrand, France, CARBIOS (Euronext Growth Paris: ALCRB) disclosed its Interim report for the initial six months of 2025. The company, specializing in advancing biological technologies to revolutionize the plastic and textile life cycle, shared this information with shareholders and the financial sector.

data.title: Analyst raises Dow Inc. (DOW) price forecast to $26 from $24, reporting $9.97B revenue & $0.19 loss per share in Q3.
data.description: An analyst at B of A Securities, Matthew DeYoe, has revised the price forecast for Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) up to $26 from $24, maintaining a Neutral rating. The chemical company reported adjusted earnings of -19 cents per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of -29 cents. Revenue dropped by 8% Y/Y to $9.97 billion, falling short of the $10.23 billion estimate. Dow anticipates fourth-quarter 2025 net sales around $9.4 billion compared to the consensus of $10.2 billion. DeYoe highlights that Dow's earnings surpassed initial expectations due to robust cost-cutting measures, and quarterly EBIT showed improvement thanks to reduced depreciation and amortization. The forecasted fourth-quarter EBIT of $725 million also exceeds analysts' expectations.

data.title: $19B crypto market loss sparks discussion on $200K BTC by 2025, with ETFs serving as potential cap on growth.
data.description: Bitcoin's price may still reach $200,000 by the end of the year, even with the recent market crash. However, the absence of ETF purchases is currently constraining its upward movement.

data.title: Monetary Metals partners with Goldstrom Group to offer gold lease financing to jewelers, effective Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: Goldstrom Group, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, revealed on October 24, 2025, a collaboration with Monetary Metals & Co. to introduce gold lease financing options to its jeweler clients. This new partnership aims to provide Goldstrom's jewelry customers with access to Monetary Metals' services.

data.title: EMTAR successfully validates new chip for 6G NTN with TSMC, enabling integrated connectivity solutions with exceptional sensitivity and low latency.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, EMTAR Technologies revealed the achievement of silicon validation for its cutting-edge chip designed for 6G non-terrestrial networks (NTN). In partnership with TSMC, the tech company has created an advanced platform that allows for highly sophisticated and smart connectivity solutions on a single chip. This innovation offers outstanding sensitivity, energy efficiency, and extremely low latency signal processing capabilities, which are crucial factors for the advancement of next-gen sensing and communication technologies. The successful validation marks a significant milestone in the development of this new chip.

data.title: Oct. 24, 2025: Cielo Waste Solutions Corp. confirms no material change in operations despite market activity rise.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on October 24, 2025, Cielo Waste Solutions Corp. (TSXV: CMC; OTCQB: CWSFF) has stated, at the behest of CIRO, that there have been no significant alterations in the company's operations that could explain the recent surge in market activity. The company's management has affirmed that they are not aware of any developments that would justify the heightened trading volume.

data.title: Elevation Midstream's DJ South Gathering announces open season for new gathering system in Colorado, seeking shipper commitments.
data.description: Denver-based Elevation Midstream, LLC has revealed that its subsidiary, DJ South Gathering, LLC, is initiating a binding open season to secure shipper commitments for a new gathering system known as the "Pipeline." This system aims to gather and transport crude oil from Adams and Arapahoe Counties in Colorado to delivery points at the Pla. The Pipeline project presents an opportunity for interested parties to support the infrastructure development.

data.title: Crypto.com applies for US trust bank charter for federally regulated custody & trust services, pending approval.
data.description: If granted approval, the charter would enable the crypto exchange to provide federally regulated custody and trust services within the United States.

data.title: COTHM Pakistan partners with MindHYVE.ai™ for AI-powered education; MoU signed on Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: In Lahore, Pakistan on October 23, 2025, The College of Tourism & Hotel Management (COTHM Pakistan) announced a significant partnership by signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with MindHYVE.ai™. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the field of tourism and hospitality in Pakistan through AI-powered learning and academic advancements. This agreement marks a pivotal moment in the industry as it combines the expertise of COTHM Pakistan with the innovative technology of MindHYVE.ai™, propelling the sector forward.

data.title: NextNav and Oscilloquartz integrate 5G timing for critical infrastructure. Milestone achieved with NextNav 5G PNT tech and Oscilloquartz GNSS grandmaster clock. Serving national security, public safety, and enterprise timing applications.
data.description: A significant progress was made by NextNav (NN) and Oscilloquartz, an Adtran company, as they announced the successful integration of NextNav's 5G-based Positioning, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) technology with an Oscilloquartz GNSS-enabled grandmaster clock. This collaboration, a crucial milestone for the companies, advances towards offering a GPS complement and backup for national security, public safety, and mission critical enterprise timing applications. The integration aims to strengthen reliability in crucial services, benefiting various sectors with heightened precision.

data.title: GitHub improves Copilot with custom model for better code completions, boosting speed and accuracy. Focus on developer input and real-world usecases.
data.description: GitHub has rolled out a new tailored model for Copilot, aimed at boosting code completion speed and accuracy. The update prioritizes developer input and practical application to refine performance. This enhancement aims to provide more efficient and precise coding support for users.

data.title: Child Abuse Advocate Andrea Leeb's memoir hits USA Today bestseller, highlights mother’s abuse causing blindness. LA, Oct 24, 2025.
data.description: A recently published memoir written by child abuse advocate, Andrea Leeb, has achieved bestseller status on USA Today. Leeb, who holds multiple roles including lawyer, nurse, scuba instructor, and yoga teacher, is also a member of the advisory board for the UCLA Rape Treatment Center and Stuart House. The memoir has garnered significant attention, reaching a wide audience and gaining popularity among readers.

data.title: Inventor from Virginia Beach creates Panel Tote to lift and carry panels, reducing strain and improving efficiency.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from Virginia Beach, VA shared his motivation behind creating THE PANEL TOTE, stating his experience as a framer and hanger inspired the innovation. The creation aims to offer a more efficient method for lifting and carrying panels, designed to minimize strain and enhance safety. This invention could potentially benefit countless individuals involved in similar tasks across various industries.

data.title: People Magazine features Scott Badler's new biography on JFK's early life, "Becoming JFK," indicating national interest.
data.description: In a significant development on October 21, 2025, PEOPLE Magazine showcased widespread attention to the formative years of John F. Kennedy by unveiling an exclusive feature on Scott Badler's latest biography, "Becoming JFK: John F. Kennedy's Early Path to Leadership." The publication date of this feature marked a key moment in the narrative, garnering attention on a national level.

data.title: IRSA files 20-F Form for FY 2025; leading real estate company in Argentina. Document available on company website.
data.description: In Buenos Aires on October 24, 2025, IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones S.A. (NYSE: IRS, ByMA: IRSA), the top real estate company in Argentina, has submitted its 20-F Form for the Fiscal Year 2025 that concluded on June 30, 2025, to the SEC. The form is now accessible on the company's website www.irsa.com.ar. Shareholders are encouraged to access the document for more information.

data.title: Ademi Firm probes if Adverum Biotechnologies (Nasdaq: ADVM) is securing fair price in Eli Lilly deal. Join investigation.
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by The Ademi Firm in Milwaukee as of October 24, 2025, regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and law violations by Adverum (Nasdaq: ADVM) in its deal with Eli Lilly. Individuals seeking to participate in the investigation or acquire more details can visit the provided link.
